calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2025 Continued To Aug-20-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances
David Gonzalez, ESQ. of Jones Day. Tel: 415-875-5820 for Defendants FUNDERA, INC. and NERDWALLET, INC.
Court Reporter: Jane Hong,CSR #11975,email: csrjane@hotmail.com, Tel: 909-831-2644.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing is held. Plaintiff's counsel initially contested the tentative ruling. However, according to Defendant's counsel, they received a call from Plaintiff's counsel on the morning of the hearing indicating that Plaintiff would submit to the tentative ruling and would not appear in court. The matter was discussed.Upon the conclusion, The Court will adopt its tentative ruling.

Defendants Fundera Inc. and NerdWallet's demurrer is SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.

(see word minutes for complete detail.)

Order Signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Court Reporter: Jane Hong,CSR #11975,email: csrjane@hotmail.com, Tel: 909-831-2644. Reported(302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Continued To May-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
